name: Olive Garden Pizza Bianco
recipeIngredient: 2 ready-to-serve seasoned, thick pizza crusts (6 inches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the filling and mix thoroughly.
2. Divide the filling in half and spread on each crust.
3. Prepare toppings and divide in half.
4. Sprinkle green onions, olives, and tomatoes over the crusts.
5. Top with mozzarella and Parmesan.
6. Sprinkle tops with oregano and basil.
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes until filling is hot and cheese has melted.
8. Cut into 6 wedges.
